what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment ledger entry that links a board item (board://item-4ddf2a4b) to the dragnet-development channel with type board_items and an added timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter metadata only, with no body content
Target is a board:// URI referencing item-4ddf2a4b
standouts: File contains only metadata, no explanatory content

Uses id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
References an external board item via a board:// URI scheme
notes: A bare ledger entry that records a channel-to-board-item attachment with no further context or body.
questions: What content or state does board item item-4ddf2a4b represent?

intention_signals: It appears to be trying to persistently associate a board item with a channel so the channel memory system can reference or surface that board item.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI as the target of a channel attachment record.
